not_linked: ❌ {user} hasn't linked an account. Use `{prefix}linkleague Name#TAG`.
invalid_db_format: ❌ Error: The Riot ID saved in the database is in an invalid format.
account_not_found: ❌ Account `{riot_id}` not found (Account-V1). Check if the name and tag are correct.
rank_data_error: ❌ Could not find ranking data for `{riot_id}` on the BR server.
